phrases.intent_en: Ask where the customer service desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de atención al cliente?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOH-deh es-TA el mos-tra-DOR de a-ten-SYON al klee-EN-te?

likely_response.local: Planta baja, junto a la entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Ground floor, next to the main entrance.

responses.english: Ground floor, next to the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: PLAHN-tah BAH-hah HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL
responses.local: Planta baja, junto a la entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a specific store
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la tienda Zara?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah TYEHN-dah ZAH-rah?

likely_response.local: Primera planta, pasillo central número cinco.
likely_response.pronunciation: pree-MEH-rah PLAHN-tah pah-SEEL-loh thehnt-RAHL NÚ-meh-roh THEEN-koh
likely_response.translation_en: First floor, central corridor number five.

responses.english: First floor, central corridor number five.
responses.phonetic: pree-MEH-rah PLAHN-tah pah-SEEL-loh thehnt-RAHL NÚ-meh-roh THEEN-koh
responses.local: Primera planta, pasillo central número cinco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the parking payment machines are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están las máquinas de pago parking?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lahs MAH-kee-nahs deh PAH-goh PAHR-king?

likely_response.local: Junto a los ascensores del parking P1.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LOHS ah-sthehn-SOH-rehs DEHL pahr-KEENH P
likely_response.translation_en: In the basement, near the elevators.

responses.english: In the basement, near the elevators.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LOHS ah-sthehn-SOH-rehs DEHL pahr-KEENH P
responses.local: Junto a los ascensores del parking P1.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if gift wrapping is available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen servicio de envoltorio para regalos aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs tee-EH-nehn sehr-bee-THEE-oh DEH ehn-bohl-toh-REE-oh PAH-rah reh-GAH-lohs ah-k-Í

likely_response.translation_en: Check at checkout, varies by store.

responses.english: Check at checkout, varies by store.
